# polymarket_order_book (Data Source)

Reads the live Polymarket CLOB order book for a single outcome token, returning the full bid and ask ladders. Token IDs come from a market's `clob_token_ids`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Read a live order book. Token IDs come from a market's clob_token_ids.
data "polymarket_market" "m" { id = "540817" }

data "polymarket_order_book" "yes" {
  token_id = data.polymarket_market.m.clob_token_ids[0]
}

output "best_bid" { value = try(data.polymarket_order_book.yes.bids[0], null) }
output "best_ask" { value = try(data.polymarket_order_book.yes.asks[0], null) }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token_id` (String) CLOB ERC-1155 token ID of the outcome to read. Obtain it from a market's `clob_token_ids` attribute. This is the only required input.

### Read-Only

- `asks` (Attributes List) Sell orders resting in the book, ordered descending by price. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--asks))
- `bids` (Attributes List) Buy orders resting in the book, ordered ascending by price. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--bids))
- `hash` (String) Content hash uniquely identifying this order book snapshot.
- `last_trade_price` (String) Price at which this token most recently traded, in `[0, 1]`.
- `market` (String) Condition ID of the parent market the token belongs to.
- `min_order_size` (String) Minimum order size accepted for this token, in shares.
- `neg_risk` (Boolean) Whether the token participates in a negative-risk (multi-outcome) market.
- `tick_size` (String) Smallest price increment accepted for this token (e.g. `0.01`).
- `timestamp` (String) Server timestamp of the snapshot, in milliseconds since the Unix epoch.

<a id="nestedatt--asks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `asks`

Read-Only:

- `price` (String) Price of this level, in `[0, 1]`, as a decimal string.
- `size` (String) Total size resting at this price level, in shares, as a decimal string.


<a id="nestedatt--bids"></a>
### Nested Schema for `bids`

Read-Only:

- `price` (String) Price of this level, in `[0, 1]`, as a decimal string.
- `size` (String) Total size resting at this price level, in shares, as a decimal string.
